# SMA Research Platform

> Open-source evidence-first drug research platform for Spinal Muscular Atrophy (SMA)

## What this site provides

The SMA Research Platform aggregates, structures, and prioritizes global SMA evidence automatically. It is designed for researchers, clinicians, and drug developers working on Spinal Muscular Atrophy therapeutics.

## Key facts

- 4,582 PubMed sources ingested and analyzed
- 22,607 LLM-extracted claims from all 4,582 research abstracts (with source paper context)
- 189 prioritized hypotheses ranked in 3 tiers (A/B/C)
- 449 clinical trials from ClinicalTrials.gov
- 21 molecular targets scored across 7 dimensions (10 established + 11 from omics convergence analysis)
- 16 drugs tracked (3 approved + 13 pipeline: Phase 1-3 and preclinical from Cure SMA pipeline)
- 428 knowledge graph edges across 34 relationship types (STRING PPI, UniProt GO, KEGG, ChEMBL, conservation, claim-based, analytical module edges: regeneration, NMJ retrograde, bioelectric, pathway crosstalk, dual-target, metabolic, splicing)
- 226 drug outcomes — structured failure/success database from literature
- 188 compounds screened via RDKit (drug-likeness, BBB, ADMET)
- 19,000+ ChEMBL/PubChem compounds screened via molecule screener (direct API search, drug-likeness filter)
- 57 drug repurposing candidates from cross-disease + ChEMBL cross-reference
- 16 cutting-edge research directions (Querdenker + Harvard-level)
- 53 curated research links across 9 categories
- Daily automated 13-stage pipeline at 06:00 UTC (ingestion → extraction → scoring → search index → hypothesis convergence → molecule screening)

## Disease context

Spinal Muscular Atrophy (SMA) is a genetic neuromuscular disease caused by loss of the SMN1 gene (chromosome 5q13). It is the most common genetic cause of infant death. Incidence: ~1:10,000 births. Carrier frequency: 1:35-50. SMN2 copy number is the primary severity modifier. Three therapies are approved but there is no cure.

## Molecular targets

### Established targets (scored)
1. SMN2 — Primary therapeutic target, severity modifier (composite score: 89%)
2. SMN1 — Primary disease gene, absent in patients (score: 82%)
3. SMN Protein — Essential for snRNP biogenesis (score: 60%)
4. NCALD — Calcium sensor, knockdown rescues SMA (score: 48%)
5. PLS3 — Natural severity modifier (score: 47%)
6. UBA1 — Ubiquitin homeostasis (score: 43%)
7. MTOR_PATHWAY — Dysregulated in SMA motor neurons (score: 40%)
8. NMJ_MATURATION — Neuromuscular junction defects (score: 39%)
9. STMN2 — Neuroprotective, axonal growth (score: 38%)
10. CORO1C — Actin-binding potential modifier (score: 5%)

### Discovery targets (from omics convergence analysis)
11. LY96 — TLR4 coreceptor, neuroinflammation (score: 40%, 27 claims)
12. NEDD4L — Ubiquitin pathway, related to UBA1 (score: 39%, 40 claims)
13. SPATA18 — Mitochondrial quality control (score: 33%, 15 claims)
14. LDHA — Metabolic reprogramming in SMA motor neurons (score: 31%, 5 claims)
15. CAST — Calpain inhibitor, neuroprotection (score: 27%, 3 claims)
16. SULF1 — ECM remodeling, heparan sulfate signaling (score: 25%, 13 claims)
17. ANK3 — Ankyrin-G, Nodes of Ranvier integrity (score: 25%, 9 claims)
18. DNMT3B — Epigenetic regulation, SMN2 exon 7 modifier (score: 22%, 8 claims)
19. CD44 — Cell adhesion / ECM receptor (score: 22%, 3 claims)
20. CTNNA1 — Cytoskeletal integrity, complements PLS3 (score: 0%, pending)
21. GALNT6 — O-linked glycosylation, NMJ protein maturation (score: 0%, pending)

## Approved therapies

- Nusinersen (Spinraza): ASO targeting SMN2 ISS-N1, intrathecal, approved 2016
- Risdiplam (Evrysdi): Small molecule SMN2 splicing modifier, oral, approved 2020
- Onasemnogene abeparvovec (Zolgensma): AAV9 gene replacement, single IV dose, approved 2019

## API endpoints

All data is accessible via REST API at https://sma-research.info/api/v2/

- GET /api/v2/stats — Platform statistics
- GET /api/v2/targets — All molecular targets with metadata
- GET /api/v2/trials — Clinical trials (449 entries, filterable by status/phase)
- GET /api/v2/drugs — Drug/therapy data (16 entries, filterable by approval_status)
- GET /api/v2/sources — PubMed literature (4,582 papers with abstracts)
- GET /api/v2/claims — LLM-extracted claims (22,607 structured assertions, ?enriched=true for source paper context)
- GET /api/v2/hypotheses — Generated hypotheses
- GET /api/v2/hypotheses/prioritized — Ranked hypotheses with tier assignments (189 entries)
- GET /api/v2/scores — 7-dimension target composite scores
- GET /api/v2/datasets — Curated omics datasets
- GET /api/v2/comparative/species — Model organisms for cross-species analysis
- GET /api/v2/comparative/orthologs/{symbol} — Ortholog mapping across species
- GET /api/v2/research/directions — 16 cutting-edge research directions
- GET /api/v2/research/directions/{id} — Deep-dive with connected targets, claims, hypotheses
- GET /api/v2/screen/candidates — Integrated drug candidate ranking
- GET /api/v2/screen/repurposing — Drug repurposing candidates
- GET /api/v2/drug-outcomes — Drug failure/success database
- GET /api/v2/graph — Knowledge graph nodes and edges (force-directed visualization data)
- GET /api/v2/graph/stats — Graph statistics and edge type breakdown
- GET /api/v2/stats/pipeline — Pipeline run history and extended stats
- GET /api/v2/export/{table}?fmt=json|csv — Export any table (targets, claims, hypotheses, drug_outcomes, etc.)
- GET /api/v2/preprints — bioRxiv/medRxiv preprints scanned for SMA relevance
- GET /api/v2/search?q=...&mode=hybrid — Semantic search (FAISS + all-mpnet-base-v2, 768-dim embeddings)
- GET /api/v2/blackboard — Agent message bus for research swarm coordination
- GET /api/v2/splice/benchmark — SMN2 splice variant benchmark (765 variants, 4-dimension scoring)
- GET /api/v2/splice/benchmark/therapeutic — Therapeutically relevant splice variants (ISS-N1, position 6)
- GET /api/v2/ask?q=... — Conversational research assistant (RAG: hybrid search + Claude Sonnet synthesis)
- GET /api/v2/hypotheses/convergence — Evidence convergence signals for hypothesis auto-generation
- POST /api/v2/hypotheses/generate — Trigger AI hypothesis generation from converging evidence
- GET /api/v2/screen/molecules — ChEMBL/PubChem molecule screening stats and top hits
- POST /api/v2/screen/molecules/all — Trigger molecule screening for all targets (admin)
- GET /api/v2/screen/top1000?target=...&min_pchembl=5&limit=1000 — Curated Top 1000 SMA drug candidates (ranked by composite: potency + target relevance + drug-likeness)
- GET /api/v2/write/summary?subject=...&format=...&type=... — AI evidence summary writer (grant_section, paper_intro, briefing, hypothesis_rationale)
- GET /api/v2/write/compare?targets=...&format=... — Comparative evidence summary across multiple targets
- GET /api/v2/crispr/guides?symbol=SMN2&max_guides=20 — CRISPR sgRNA guide design for SMA targets (ISS-N1, ESE, ESS strategies)
- POST /api/v2/crispr/guides — Design guides for custom DNA sequence
- GET /api/v2/crispr/motifs — SMN2 exon 7 regulatory motifs (ISS-N1, Tra2-beta, hnRNP A1)
- GET /api/v2/aav/evaluate?cargo=SMN1_cDNA — AAV capsid evaluation for SMA gene therapy (9 serotypes ranked)
- GET /api/v2/aav/capsid/{serotype} — Detailed AAV capsid info with packaging for all cargos
- GET /api/v2/aav/cargos — Therapeutic cargo types (SMN1_cDNA, dCas9_CRISPRi, base_editor, prime_editor)
- GET /api/v2/gene-versions/smn2 — Gene edit versioning ("GitHub for Life") — SMN2 variant tree with commit hashes
- POST /api/v2/gene-versions/edit — Simulate and version a custom sequence edit
- GET /api/v2/dock/score?pocket=SMN2_SPLICE_SITE&limit=50 — Pharmacophore-based docking score prediction (7 binding pockets)
- POST /api/v2/dock/score — Score custom compound against binding pocket
- GET /api/v2/dock/pockets — List all 7 target binding pockets with characteristics
- GET /api/v2/prime-editing/feasibility — Prime editing feasibility assessment (PE2/PE3/PEmax for C6T correction, ISS-N1, ESE)
- GET /api/v2/md/simulations — Available MD simulation templates (6 SMA-relevant simulations)
- GET /api/v2/md/generate/{sim_key} — Generate OpenMM simulation scripts (setup + production + analysis)
- GET /api/v2/spatial/penetration — Drug penetration analysis across 6 spinal cord zones (BBB, CSF exposure, vascular density)
- GET /api/v2/spatial/expression — Target × zone expression matrix (10 targets × 6 zones)
- GET /api/v2/spatial/silent-zones — Therapeutic silent zones where current drugs underperform
- GET /api/v2/regen/genes — Cross-species regeneration genes with SMA comparison (12 genes, axolotl/zebrafish)
- GET /api/v2/regen/pathways — Regeneration vs SMA pathway comparisons (7 pathways with gap scores)
- GET /api/v2/regen/silenced — Silenced regeneration programs in human SMA
- GET /api/v2/nmj/signals — NMJ retrograde signaling molecules (10 signals, happy muscle hypothesis)
- GET /api/v2/nmj/ev-cargo — Extracellular vesicle therapeutic cargo for NMJ delivery
- GET /api/v2/nmj/chip-models — Organ-on-chip models for NMJ validation (3 chip types)
- GET /api/v2/nmj/happy-muscle — Full "happy muscle → surviving neuron" hypothesis analysis
- GET /api/v2/multisystem/organs — 7 organ systems affected in SMA beyond motor neurons
- GET /api/v2/multisystem/combinations — Combination therapy strategies for multisystem SMA
- GET /api/v2/multisystem/energy — Energy budget model for SMA motor neurons
- GET /api/v2/multisystem/full — Full multisystem SMA analysis
- GET /api/v2/bioelectric/channels — Ion channel expression profile in SMA motor neurons (9 channels)
- GET /api/v2/bioelectric/vmem — Vmem state classification (4 states, 55% rescuable)
- GET /api/v2/bioelectric/electroceuticals — Electroceutical interventions for SMA (5 modalities)
- GET /api/v2/bioelectric/profile — Full bioelectric analysis with combination approach
- GET /api/v2/splice/cross-species — Cross-species splicing map (10 axolotl/zebrafish regeneration splice events → human orthologs)
- GET /api/v2/splice/cross-species/actionable — Splice events with highest reactivation feasibility
- GET /api/v2/splice/cross-species/compare — Regeneration vs degeneration splicing pattern comparison
- GET /api/v2/rna/targets — 6 RNA target sites in SMN2 (ISS-N1, 5'ss/U1, ESE2, ESS, branch point, TSL2)
- GET /api/v2/rna/modulators — Known RNA-binding SMN2 splicing modulators (risdiplam, branaplam, etc.)
- POST /api/v2/rna/predict — Predict RNA-binding potential of a compound across all SMN2 sites
- POST /api/v2/rna/benchmark — Benchmark compound against known SMN2 modulators
- GET /api/v2/screen/dual-target — Dual-target candidates (SMN2 splicing + ion channel, 8 candidates ranked)
- GET /api/v2/screen/dual-target/channels — Ion channel target → drug mapping
- GET /api/v2/screen/dual-target/synergy — Synergy potential analysis across dual-target candidates
- GET /api/v2/twin/compartments — Motor neuron compartment model (5 compartments with SMA health baselines)
- GET /api/v2/twin/pathways — 8 signaling pathways modeled in digital twin
- GET /api/v2/twin/drugs — Available drugs for digital twin simulation
- POST /api/v2/twin/simulate — Simulate drug combination on motor neuron digital twin (JSON: {"drugs": ["Risdiplam", "4-Aminopyridine"]})
- GET /api/v2/twin/optimize — Find optimal drug combinations via exhaustive simulation
- GET /api/v2/lab/assays — SMA assay library (8 standardized assays with cost, timeline, protocol)
- GET /api/v2/lab/cloud-labs — Cloud lab integration specs (Emerald Cloud Lab, Strateos, Opentrons)
- GET /api/v2/lab/design?hypothesis=...&budget=medium — Generate experiment design from hypothesis text
- GET /api/v2/federated/protocols — Federated learning protocols for SMA (FedAvg, FedProx, SCAFFOLD, 4 protocols)
- GET /api/v2/federated/omop — OMOP/OHDSI concept mappings for SMA clinical data (14 concepts)
- GET /api/v2/federated/privacy-budget?epsilon=1.0&delta=1e-5&n_queries=50 — Privacy budget calculator (basic, advanced, RDP composition)
- GET /api/v2/federated/data-tiers — Data sharing tier framework (4 tiers: aggregate → federated → synthetic → trusted env)
- GET /api/v2/translate/regulatory — Regulatory pathway map for SMA therapeutics (FDA/EMA, 6 pathways)
- GET /api/v2/translate/grants — Grant application templates for SMA research (NIH R01, R21, Cure SMA, ERC)
- GET /api/v2/translate/validation — 5-level hypothesis validation pipeline (computational → biochemical → cell-based → animal → IND)
- GET /api/v2/translate/validate?hypothesis_id=...&evidence_score=0.5&twin_improvement=0.1 — Run hypothesis through validation gate check
- GET /api/v2/docs — Interactive API documentation (Swagger)

## Research links

53 curated resources across 9 categories at https://sma-research.info/links/
Categories: Genomic & Molecular Databases, Clinical Trial Registries, Drug & Target Discovery, Protein & Pathway Tools, Literature & Reviews, Patient Organizations, Computational & AI Tools, News & Community, Regulatory & Safety

## Analysis pipeline

Phase 1 (complete): Evidence ingestion → normalization → LLM claim extraction → target linking → network projection → hypothesis generation
Phase 2 (complete): Multi-criteria scoring → hypothesis prioritization → tier assignment (A/B/C)
Phase 3 (complete): Data source expansion — ChEMBL bioactivity (188 compounds), UniProt protein annotations (18 proteins), STRING-DB interactions (10 PPI edges), KEGG pathways (41 genes)
Phase 4 (complete): Cross-species comparative biology — ortholog mapping across axolotl, zebrafish, naked mole rat, C. elegans, Drosophila (55 orthologs, 136 conservation edges)
Phase 5 (complete): Querdenker research directions — cross-disease learning (ALS, DMD, SBMA, CMT), bear hibernation muscle preservation, bioelectric reprogramming (Michael Levin), spatial multi-omics, NMJ-on-a-chip, epigenetic dimming, ECM engineering, SMA as multisystem disease, NDRG1/cell dormancy, RNA decoy, DUBTACs, spinal cord stimulation
Phase 6 (in progress): Computational drug discovery — RDKit screening (188 compounds), ADMET prediction, drug repurposing, integrated candidate ranking, CRISPR guide design (3 strategies for SMN2), AAV capsid evaluation (9 serotypes). Planned: molecular docking, dual-target molecules
Phase 8 (in progress): Knowledge infrastructure — FAISS semantic search (768-dim), RAG research assistant (Claude Sonnet), hypothesis auto-generation from evidence convergence
Phase 9 (in progress): Open data commons — drug failure/success DB (226 outcomes), SMN2 splice benchmark (765 SNVs), HuggingFace dataset
Phase 10 (complete): Warp-Speed Infrastructure — blackboard architecture, bioRxiv scanner, hypothesis auto-generator, gene edit versioning ("GitHub for Life"), digital twin of motor neuron (5 compartments, 8 pathways, drug combination optimizer), Lab-OS experiment design (8 assays, 3 cloud labs), zero-knowledge data sharing (federated learning, OMOP/OHDSI, privacy budgets, 4 data tiers)
Phase 7 (complete): Advanced analytics — spatial multi-omics (6 spinal cord zones, drug penetration), cross-species regeneration signatures (12 genes, 7 pathway comparisons), NMJ retrograde signaling (happy muscle hypothesis, EV cargo, organ-on-chip), multisystem SMA (7 organ systems, combination therapies, energy budget), bioelectric reprogramming (9 ion channels, Vmem states, electroceuticals)
Phase 11 (complete): Translation & impact — regulatory pathway mapping (FDA/EMA, 6 pathways), grant templates (NIH R01/R21, Cure SMA, ERC), 5-level hypothesis validation pipeline (computational to IND)

## Drug Failure & Success Database

Unique structured resource capturing WHY SMA drugs succeed or fail. 226 outcomes extracted from literature:
- Structured: Molecule → Target → Mechanism → Outcome → Failure Reason → Key Finding
- Outcome types: success, partial_success, failure, inconclusive, discontinued, ongoing
- Failure reasons: toxicity, lack_of_efficacy, poor_bioavailability, off_target_effects, poor_bbb_penetration, manufacturing, commercial, safety_signal

## Technology

Stack: Python / FastAPI / PostgreSQL / Claude (Haiku for extraction, Sonnet for RAG) / FAISS / sentence-transformers / RDKit / Vanilla JS
All data is freely accessible via the REST API for research purposes.
MCP server available for AI agent integration (12 tools).
HuggingFace dataset: SMAResearch/sma-evidence-graph (11 tables, 73,110 rows as Parquet).
Semantic search: 768-dim embeddings (all-mpnet-base-v2) + FAISS vector index + keyword hybrid.
